text.title: NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor Core Rules
text.summary: 9 testable rules with rationale + source for nda-msa-obligation-extractor. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Each obligation MUST carry: obligation_id, source (contract section), text excerpt, owner, trigger, deadline, evidence pointer, status.
rule.rationale: Contract-management research — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Every obligation MUST cite the contract section (e.g. 'MSA §4.2') and the verbatim text excerpt; paraphrase-only obligations are forbidden.
rule.rationale: Audit-trail discipline — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Each obligation MUST have a single named owner; co-ownership ('legal + delivery') is forbidden as it diffuses accountability.
rule.rationale: Single-owner accountability — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Trigger MUST be expressed as an observable condition (date, event, threshold); 'as needed' triggers are forbidden because they never fire.
rule.rationale: Contract-obligation research — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Deadline MUST be ISO date or explicit 'continuous' / 'on-trigger'; missing deadline blocks the register.
rule.rationale: Compliance-register practice — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Each obligation MUST point to where the evidence of compliance lives (file path, ticket id, calendar reminder); orphan obligations are auto-flagged.
rule.rationale: Evidence-based compliance — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Register reviewed quarterly; new obligations triggered by amendments are added; expired obligations are archived with date.
rule.rationale: Operational hygiene — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: Sharing the register beyond the engagement team MUST redact verbatim contract excerpts unless legal cleared the share.
rule.rationale: Confidentiality discipline — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.

rule.statement: If the engagement contract has fewer than 10 operational obligations, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to NDA / MSA Obligation Extractor.
